TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Marorok, title = Marorok, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marorok} }

S.FORM: alang Marorok ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 267 buwan, 708 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 328 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 380 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 38%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 3%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Marorok hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Marorok hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Marorok hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Marorok hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Marorok hya' ga Ukang. tay 'llaw na Marorok hya' ga Olalip. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Marorok ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 267 buwan, 708 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 46% kyan ku 328 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 54% kyan ku 380 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 38%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 3%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Marorok hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Marorok hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Marorok hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Marorok hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Marorok hya' ga Ukang. tay 'llaw na Marorok hya' ga Olalip. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ marorok ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na marorok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na marorok ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na marorok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na marorok ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na marorok ħjaʔ ɣa ukaŋ. taj ʔllaw na marorok ħjaʔ ɣa olalip. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
